goal: Complete activation of inference-window and irreversibility-bounded governance documentation and executable evidence.

required_evidence: HTTP success for the formalism, lifecycle, IICT, schema, worked cases, and status routes
reports/public-activation-receipt.json produced by the deployed verification job
completion_boundary.activation_rule: Activation may be declared complete only when all required jobs and evidence items are observed from the same governed repository head or a receipt-bound descendant.
completion_boundary.fail_closed_rule: Repository presence, source commits, validator wiring, or a public page viewed from an older deployment do not independently satisfy activation.

next_automatic_action: Allow the canonical push-triggered workflow to run; ingest and validate its reports and public endpoint results before promoting activation status.
